sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Receiving an all-call on our Syndicate frequency. It's a Red Veil encode but... it seems truncated. I will play back what I have...

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Speak to us. We're listening. What is your name?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. R-r-r-ellllll.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Good, you remember. We want to help you, Rell. Tell us where you are.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. Can't. He's listening.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Who? Rell, who is listening?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap. Rap. Tap. Tap.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Sorry Operator. The message appears haunted - halted. It originated from a Steel Meridian ship near Earth. Will you investigate? I hope not.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Emergency power. Not detecting any crew. I don't like this. Search the area.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Blades. Too refined for a Grineer kill-squad. Is there anything else?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Red Veil. Could they have done this? The Veil have been Meridian allies for years. Search for survivors.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno? I lost you for a second. What did you see?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Holy child of Zariman, please help me. I serve the Veil but the flock has been driven mad. I humbly beg for the protection of you and your vessel.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I'm marking the area. Stay alert. It may be an ambush.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Great, blind,Queen... help me reach the safety of Iron Wake. Our sacred muse has abandoned the temple, leaving our people in chaos.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno, if the Red Veil is in chaos we must intervene. Get Palladino to Iron Wake.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Oh holy child, I am grateful for-her Kavat growlsWhat is it Rook? Are they back?!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Brothers of blood, sisters of fire, resist the muse!

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Blessed star child, I owe you my life. Will you meet me at Iron Wake? Only you can right this wrong.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You were supposed to protect her. This mission is a failure.

xml.info: Meet Palladino at Iron Wake; Earth, Iron Wake

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Steel Meridian has received Palladino. You've been granted access to enter their base, Operator.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Iron Wake. Steel Meridian has built an impressive base of operations right under the nose of the Grineer authority. The Veil's Speaker will be here, under guard. Find her.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Leave your vessel at the door, sacred child. Come.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Hush, Rook, this is our sacred guest! I am Palladino. Holy speaker of the Veil, like my mother, and hers before... We speak to the other side, to him. Without his focus, I pray... I pray he answers.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Righteous Rell - of harrowed stars - of hallowed chains. Speak. For an age you've guarded the divide between Dust and Void. Speak. From within your everlasting sacred vessel, you've held the lidless eye. Speak!

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: sighsI cannot reach holy Rell from here. I will need his sacred focus: a relic stolen from the temple. I beg of you to find it and return it here. Only then, will he speak to us. Only then will we truly understand.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Veil rituals will incite fanaticism, but don't be drawn in. I'm not convinced this 'Rell' even exists. I fear we'll have to play Palladino's game to find out. Ordis has been tracking Red Veil disturbances... that's the best place to start.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator! A Red Veil Seance! How... delightful? I have marked a possible Red Veil disturbance but... perhaps you would prefer to- brew some leaves and... Sorry. Navigation is bleeding, Operator.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Uhh... Waiting. Navigation is waiting. Oh, my.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Find Rell's object-of-focus, child. You are close to this sacred relic, I am certain.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: These messages, they express Rell's suffering. He's lashing out. I should have seen the cracks forming...

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I don't understand. How would Rell know about the dream?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Great Sentient Queen, forgive me, but what you are, what you've made of yourself... is merely drawn from the dreams of these divine children. You are not she, you are not... Margulis.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: What are you saying? That Rell is a Tenno? Impossible. All Tenno are known to me. I protect them, as she did.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Oh, but not Rell. Margulis cast him out, for he was different. Our foremothers took him in and studied his teachings. We became the Veil. The shroud of his blessed existence.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Cast out... I don't believe you—

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap. The man in the wall.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: The man in the wall! That is what he called it. Hush... try to follow his voice!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. Mmm.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: The Donda! His mother gave him this. Holy Rell was not like other children. Sound, color, touch... it overwhelmed him. The Donda's hum let him focus.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmmmm - No! MINE!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap. Rap. Tap. Tap.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Rell! What evil is this!? Sacred child, forgive me. I should have known the weight of the Void would one day crush the light from you.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Rell has become the very thing he warned us of. You cannot kill this, Tenno. Run! You can only run!

xml.info: Return to Iron Wake; Earth, Iron Wake

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, what was that... thing? Lotus, can you explain this? Lotus?!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Transference energy, fractured. It was so... cold, indifferent, inhuman. If Rell was Tenno, what did he become without Margulis?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: I have served Rell my whole life. Studying Rell's teachings of the Void, the dire consequence of travelling by and through it. Now I see that it is true: he alone, in his harrowing sacrifice, has guarded us. What a price he has paid.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Righteous Rell - outcast of sacred Void - hear my voice. Speak. You have been driven from the vessel by your suffering. You have swallowed the poison stars so we would not... Holy Rell, Speak! The Tenno who rejected you have come to your aid!

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: He's here... The Donda, it's working, giving him humanity. We are listening Rell... Speak!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... shy?

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: No, try again.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: This one?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... angry?

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: No. Try again.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... confused?

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Close...

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Very good.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: And this one?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... sleepy.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Close...

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... surprised.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: No. Try again.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Good Rell!

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: And how about this one?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Momma.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Yes, Rell—

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Momma!

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Go ahead, Rell.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm... sleepy.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: No. Try again.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: We're in a ship.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Yes?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Impossible speed, beyond the Brankle Gap constant.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Uh, I think so... you're better with that stuff. But it's amazing isn't it?-

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: So why don't they fix me?

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Rell. You know why.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm.

spLine.sp: advances the dialogue KayClose.../No. Try again.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Rell. Why?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. Because I'm not broken.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: That's right. Different, so I love you even more.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Happy.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Yes Rell! You make me so happy.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: This memory - his humanity still remains, buried in these emotions he so often failed to grasp. Could they be the key to saving him from this?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno - I have a theory. Return to your Orbiter and I'll explain.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: These disturbances, they are Transference energy, split apart from a single mind. If we could capture them, send them back...

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator - Simaris may have a tool for this task. I wonder if his Kinetic Siphons could be repurposed to- bust ...capture these manifestations?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Holy Rell, let us bring you the peace you have earned... Guide this Tenno so you can return to the Harrowing vessel... so that you might rest.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Rell's warnings... those dire consequences... he was talking about Void exposure, wasn't he? The effect it has on human minds is well understood...

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: But it's not. This isn't some kind of deep pressure bends as Margulis suspected. Rell saw what it was, truly. An entity, indifferent. Old as stars.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. My fault. Touching is too much noise. It makes me... makes me... angry.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: There! An emotion, manifest from the game Rell played as a child!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: See if you can stabilize it with a Kinetic Siphon.

xml.infoMarked: Repeating hint lines. They appear in the next two missions as well.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno, you need to capture it!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: It's too strong for the Siphon, try and weaken it.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: The manifestation is fighting the Siphon. See if you can damage it.

xml.infoMarked: If player runs out of Kinetic Siphons at any point in this mission

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You've run out of Kinetic Siphons. I'm sorry, there is nothing more you can do here.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap. I don't want to go back!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I'm detecting other manifestations. Defend yourself and try to trap them.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Another, don't let it escape!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: He's listening. He knows what you're doing. It makes him stronger.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Good. You've captured the manifestations here. Now get out before Rell's disturbance catches up with you.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Angry: Someone takes the thing you love.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Bored: Waiting too much. There is nothing fun to look at.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Embarrassed: Talking and everyone looks at you.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: I don't know if you can make Rell whole again, but whatever you're doing, this disturbance is growing stronger, resisting you. Don't let it stop you. Bring Rell home, to the temple.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Is that where Rell is? Has the Veil preserved him in cryosleep as the other Tenno were on Lua?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: No. We didn't have that option.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: He's listening but I'm so... Help me.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Rell... it's just you, alone and trapped in a Transference loop. Don't give into these delusions of Void exposure. There is no man in the wall.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Don't say that!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: They are here - the Transference pieces. Track down these manifestations and capture them.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Why are you helping me? You hated me.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Alright, no more to be found here. Get to extraction.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Excited: All the spider eggs are starting to hatch!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Happy: Momma has a stretchy smile.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Sad: Why did the babies eat the mother?

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, there is no evidence of any... thing... in the Void. By my calculations, Rell has lost control of his Transference. If we can gather these emotions I hope he will be himself again.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: You will need Kinetic Siphons to trap Rell's emotions. Simaris will have some for sale in the Relay.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: How could Rell have lived this long? Without the long dream?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: In a way, he didn't. He knew his mortality would undo his purpose, so he gave up his humanity, forever. He committed his soul to the undying vessel-

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: His Warframe.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Yes. He commanded we chain it within the depths of the sacred temple. An eternal vigil against the Indifference.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: And you believed him. You helped him do it.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Yes. After everything you've seen, wouldn't you?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: There, Tenno! Trap it!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Another, don't let it escape!

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Blessed Tenno, Rell has returned to his sacred vessel. I will join him there at once. Please, come, for I fear... I haven't got the strength to do what must be done next...

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Shy: Meeting someone new and can't say hello.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Scared: You look around and Momma's not there.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Tired: You run and run until you can't, voiced "can't run"anymore.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: If Rell's been caught in a Transference loop for this long... the psychological effects could have been catastrophic. This 'man in the wall', these delusions, symptoms of the Void exposure all Tenno experienced. I hope that Palladino can find peace for Rell so this never happens again.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Our temple. Our home. His tomb. Come. Meet our guiding light.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: This is why you're here, Tenno. It is time for holy Rell to rest. But I cannot bring myself to do it... to let him go. He's kept us, all of us, safe for so long and it's time for you to carry on. Release him, Tenno. Destroy the chains that bind the Harrowing vessel. He's earned his rest.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: You may enter here, but only as your true, sacred form.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Holy Rell. You have sacrificed enough. Pass on your burden and rest. Tenno. Destroy the chains... only your sacred power will damage them.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Tenno- something's wrong. That's not Rell, that's--

sp.speaker: The Indifference
sp.speech: Let's have a little quiet. It's my turn to ask the questions.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Well, love, I told you. You can't pet her that hard, be gentle or she'll bite. Are you okay, Rell?

sp.speaker: The Indifference
sp.speech: I won't let you take me... from me.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: What have you done to Rell?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: Tenno! You need to save him from this... Destroy the chains-

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: How dare you laugh at him! You should be ashamed of yourselves! Don't look away. Look at him. He's not invisible!

sp.speaker: The Indifference
sp.speech: Rap. Tap. Tap. You'll let me in, little piggy.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Momma's... not... herself, Rell. I don't think... I think you should wait with the other kids, until they fix the ship. I love you but... you have to go! Go!

sp.speaker: The Indifference
sp.speech: But the in-kids don't care about the invisible outs. If you were alone in that drift... you'd need a friend... even like me.

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: By sacred shadow and righteous blood - Blessed Rell! Your aged Vessel is dust and your chains are broken. Be free!

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. But the man in the wall. Who will... ?

sp.speaker: Palladino
sp.speech: They will have to. All of them. They owe you this. We all do.

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Mmm. Yea. I feel...

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Go on Rell, which one?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: This one, Momma. I feel... tired.

sp.speaker: Kay
sp.speech: Good Rell! You're learning! Well? Why don't you have a little rest then?

sp.speaker: Rell
sp.speech: Okay... Okay Momma.
Hey kiddo.

xml.message: “An Offering of GratitudeWith Rell at peace, we will rebuild in his honor. We will do what we have always done: take the outcasts, the ones that don't fit in, and prepare them. Thank you, to you and your great Queen for setting Rell to rest. Take this offering, it's the thing of greatest value I can give you.” —Palladino
